title: angelica longicaudata
intro: Angelica longicaudata, also known as Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a perennial plant native to China and parts of Asia, belonging to the Apiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-oxidant effects. The health benefits of Angelica longicaudata include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and other women's health issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Angelica longicaudata can be found in various forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
